summary: Tested all 8 features for pill UI fixes (iteration 267). 7/8 tests passed. One critical spacing bug found in Create Customer dialog.

ui_bugs.issue: 0px gap between pill input fields — fields are cramped/touching with no visible spacing
ui_bugs.details: Measurements confirm: Full Name bottom=311, Company Name top=311 (0px gap). Root cause: React 19 (v^19.0.0) wraps JSX fragment returns in <span display='contents'> for source mapping. The space-y-4 class uses CSS direct-child selector (> *) which stops working when there's a display:contents SPAN between the .space-y-4 div and the animation wrapper divs. All 10+ field inputs stack with zero gap.
ui_bugs.fix: In UniversalFormRenderer.tsx compact mode: change <div className="space-y-4"> to <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">. CSS gap works correctly even through display:contents children in flexbox.
ui_bugs.note: Edit Customer dialog is NOT affected (uses hardcoded JSX, no component chain with Fragment wrapper). HOWEVER: this may be a dev-mode-only issue. React 19 only adds source-map SPANs in development builds. Production builds may render correctly.

test_3_create_customer_dialog.space_y_4_class_present: true (but ineffective due to React 19 display:contents SPAN wrapper)

test_4_edit_customer_dialog.space_y_4_working: YES — 16px margins between sections (grid, address, payment, tax, save button)

test_5_filters_tab.subtitle: PASS — 'Configure the filters shown to customers in your storefront product listing.'
test_5_filters_tab.matches_products_tab: PASS — Products '+ New Product' button also 32px h-8

test_6_filters_no_errors.empty_state: PASS — dashed border 'No filters configured yet'

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Create Customer dialog — 0px gap between fields
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause:
React 19 (v^19.0.0) in development mode wraps JSX fragment returns with elements for source mapping (x-file-name, x-line-number attributes). When UniversalFormRenderer compact mode returns <>
{fields}
, React 19 wraps the content inside a display:contents SPAN. The space-y-4 Tailwind class uses CSS selector '.space-y-4 > :not([hidden]) ~ :not([hidden])' which only applies to direct children. Since the SPAN is the only direct child of .space-y-4, no margin is applied between the actual field wrapper divs inside the SPAN.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Open Create Customer dialog in dev environment → fields are cramped with 0px gap
rca_of_the_issue.verification: DOM inspection: input.parentElement.parentElement has display:contents, tagName SPAN, children contain x-file-name='UniversalFormRenderer' attributes. space-y-4 div has childCount=1 (just the SPAN).
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Replace <div className='space-y-4'> with <div className='flex flex-col gap-4'> in UniversalFormRenderer compact mode. CSS gap property works correctly through display:contents children in flexbox/grid context.
rca_of_the_issue.production_note: This may be a dev-mode-only issue — React 19 source map SPANs are only added in development builds.

action_items: FIX UniversalFormRenderer.tsx compact mode: change <div className='space-y-4'> to <div className='flex flex-col gap-4'> to fix 0px gap issue caused by React 19 dev-mode display:contents SPAN wrappers
NOTE: Verify if this issue also affects production build (React 19 dev-mode-only behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: UniversalFormRenderer.tsx: React 19 breaks space-y-4 in compact mode due to display:contents span wrapper. Use flex flex-col gap-4 instead.
Edit Customer dialog uses correct space-y-4 (direct children, no component chain) — no fix needed there.
Filters tab properly implements AdminPageHeader + size='sm' buttons — matches Products tab.

UniversalFormRenderer: The inline <style> tag inside a Fragment (<>) in React 19 triggers source-map wrapper behavior. Consider moving @keyframes fadeSlideUp to index.css and removing the inline style tag.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pill UI features from iteration 266 are still working. New fixes in 267: Edit Customer labels/spacing/grid PASS. Filters tab AdminPageHeader + size=sm PASS. Focus glow animation on all inputs PASS. ONE BUG: Create Customer dialog fields have 0px gap (not space-y-4). Root cause: React 19 display:contents SPAN wrapper around UniversalFormRenderer compact mode. Fix: use flex flex-col gap-4 instead of space-y-4. After fix, retest Create Customer dialog spacing.
